zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Scrope於1446年出生在英國越可爾本特利時，他的父親Henry Scrope28歲，母親Elizabeth Scrope27歲。他於1466年與Katherine La Zouche在英國英格蘭越可爾博爾頓 卡素 姆 雷德米爾結婚。他們至少是7個女兒的父母。他去世於1500年8月25日在英國巴金哈姆爾哈布萊登享年54歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾哈布萊登。

nameMeanings.name: Scrope
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman: of uncertain origin. Tengvik suggests derivation from the Old Scandinavian personal name Skrópi (of doubtful etymology, but compare Old Scandinavian skrópa-maðr ‘hypocrite’, containing the genitive plural form of skrópar ‘sham, hypocrisy’). It is possible, but not certain, that this personal name forms the first element of the Notts place-name Scrooby. Otherwise there is no evidence for its currency in England or, more relevantly, in Normandy. Richards Castle (in Herefs and Shrops) was apparently named after Richard Scrope, who held estates in Herefs and Worcs in 1066 and was a Norman favourite of Edward the Confessor. The Scrope family, whose name is traditionally pronounced /skru:p/, was politically important in medieval England, and acquired estates in Lincs (Barton on Humber), NR Yorks (Castle Bolton), and in ER Yorks (Flotmanby). Richard (le) Scrope of Bolton, in Wensleydale, was Lord Chancellor in the reign of Richard II. The use of le and de in the surname, suggesting either a nickname or a locative name, must be treated with caution because these were often added gratuitously to Anglo-Norman surnames as a sign of high social status.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Scrope was born in 1446, in Bentley, Yorkshire, England, his father, Henry Scrope, was 28 and his mother, Elizabeth Scrope, was 27. He married Katherine La Zouche in 1466, in Bolton Castle cum Redmire, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 daughters. He died on 25 August 1500, in Hambleden, Buckinghamshire, England, at the age of 54, and was buried in Hambleden, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

Il a épousé Katherine La Zouche en 1466, à Bolton Castle cum Redmire, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 filles. Il est décédé le 25 août 1500, à Hambleden, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Hambleden, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.Bolton Castle cum Redmire, Yorkshire, En: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 볼턴 카스틀 쿠 레드미어
ko.lifeSummary: Robert Scrope(이)가 1446년 영국 요르크실르 벤틀리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Scrope(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Scrope(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1466년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 볼턴 카스틀 쿠 레드미어에서 Katherine La Zouche(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1500년 8월 25일 영국 벅잉함실르 햄블레든에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 햄블레든에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Scrope родился в 1446 г. в местности бентли, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry Scrope было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Scrope, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine La Zouche в 1466 г. в местности болтон кастл кум редмир, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 дочерей. Он умер 25 августа 1500 г. в местности хамбледен, буккингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности хамбледен, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.
